title: iria obtusifolia
intro: Iria obtusifolia, also known as the rough-leaved Iria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iria obtusifolia are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Iria obtusifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
